text: Mobile app development starts with choosing the right approach. A responsive design ensures the app looks good and works smoothly on different screen sizes, from small phones to large tablets. Developers often decide between native apps, built specifically for one platform like iOS or Android, and cross-platform apps, which use a single codebase for multiple systems. Native apps generally offer better performance and access to device features, while cross-platform apps save time and money. Once the app is ready, it must meet strict guidelines to be published on app stores such as Google Play and Apple’s App Store, where users can download it.
